name: ZoomInfo API
what_it_does: ZoomInfo API — enterprise B2B sales intelligence platform with the industry's largest proprietary database of company and contact data, including intent signals, technographics, and org charts.
use_cases: Agents enriching enterprise CRM accounts with comprehensive company and contact data at scale
Intent signal monitoring — agents querying ZoomInfo for buying intent signals to prioritize outbound outreach
Org chart mapping — agents building account hierarchy maps for multi-stakeholder enterprise sales processes
Technographic enrichment — agents identifying target accounts using specific technology stack criteria
Real-time Webhook triggers — agents receiving ZoomInfo notifications when key contacts change jobs or companies expand
not_for: SMB/startup budgets — ZoomInfo enterprise pricing is significant (typically $10K-30K+/year)
Consumer contact data — ZoomInfo is strictly B2B professional contact data
Low-volume enrichment — credit minimums and pricing make ZoomInfo uneconomical for small-scale use
best_when: You need the most comprehensive B2B contact and company database with intent signals and org charts for enterprise sales automation at scale.
avoid_when: You're a startup or SMB — Apollo.io, Hunter, or Lusha offer similar functionality at a fraction of the cost.

auth.notes: Username and password-based token generation endpoint. JWT token for subsequent API calls. Token expires and must be refreshed. Enterprise account required.

pricing.notes: No self-serve pricing — enterprise sales process required. Pricing varies significantly based on seat count, credit volume, and add-ons. Typically multi-year contracts.

performance.rate_limits: API: 5 req/s standard; bulk search: separate endpoint; credits limited by contract

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Enterprise REST API with OpenAPI documentation. Error responses include codes and messages. Token expiry causes 401 — agents must implement refresh logic. Rate limit errors documented.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All ZoomInfo API calls are read-only queries — fully idempotent. Same query returns same data (at point in time). Credits consumed per lookup regardless of idempotency.
known_agent_gotchas: JWT token expires after 1 hour — agents must implement automatic token refresh before making API calls
Rate limit (5 req/s) is very low for agent automation — implement request queuing for batch enrichment
Credit consumption varies by endpoint — some queries cost multiple credits; agents should minimize unnecessary lookups
GDPR compliance requires data processing agreement with ZoomInfo for EU contact data
API access tier determines available endpoints — some intent signal and org chart APIs require higher-tier contracts

security_score_components.security_notes: SOC2 Type II. GDPR and CCPA compliant. JWT token with 1h expiry. US data processing — EU contacts subject to GDPR DPA requirements. Enterprise security reviews available.
